Title: Pricing > Add Pricelist
Steps:
Step Description:

Price list > Add Pricelist

Expected Result:

The system will display the New Price List screen

Step Description:

Look at the New Price List screen

Expected Result:

User sees some elements:
1.Price list name - required
2.Select the currency from the drop-down list - required
3.Add description- optional
4.Assignment widget with zero assignments
5.Create button remains disabled until the user enters the Name and selects the currency

Step Description:

Fill all fields > Click Create button

Expected Result:

The New Price List will be created by the system:
1.The New Price List is displayed on the Price Lists screen
2.Prices and Assignments widgets are active
Steps (Expected Result):
1.

The system will display the New Price List screen

2.

User sees some elements:
1.Price list name - required
2.Select the currency from the drop-down list - required
3.Add description- optional
4.Assignment widget with zero assignments
5.Create button remains disabled until the user enters the Name and selects the currency

3.

The New Price List will be created by the system:
1.The New Price List is displayed on the Price Lists screen
2.Prices and Assignments widgets are active
Steps (Step):
1.

Price list > Add Pricelist

2.

Look at the New Price List screen

3.

Fill all fields > Click Create button
